tasks.name: Add pagination to /api/users
tasks.objective: GET /api/users accepts ?page and ?limit query params, returns X-Total-Count header, and existing unpaginated callers keep working via defaults (page=1, limit=50).

tasks.name: Paginated user list in frontend
tasks.objective: UserList component consumes the paginated endpoint from T001, renders pager controls, and preserves the current sort order across page changes.

failures.summary: UserList.test.tsx fails: pager resets sort order to default on page change.
Identical failure: pager resets sort order to default on page change.

tasks.blocked_reason: Stall detected: same failure fingerprint on two consecutive attempts. Human decision needed: sort state may belong in URL params (architectural choice, candidate ADR) rather than component state.

tasks.name: Document pagination contract
tasks.objective: docs/requirements/ and the API reference describe the pagination params, defaults, and X-Total-Count header introduced in T001.
